$comment: Apply to a freshly created GitHub repo with: gh repo edit --description "$(jq -r .description .github/repo-meta.json)" $(jq -r '.topics | map("--add-topic " + .) | join(" ")' .github/repo-meta.json) --homepage "$(jq -r .homepage .github/repo-meta.json)"
description: Standalone WebRTC + AI call platform. Build voice/video rooms with humans, a bundled AI host, and any number of custom agents through one 10-line SDK or a raw 640-byte PCM WebSocket. LiveKit under the hood; your code never touches WebRTC.
